_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ensure plans of actions and milestones or remediation plans are in place for vulnerabilities identified during risk assessments, audits, inspections, etc.
reference_document_element_description: Track data compliance remediation activities, including milestone monitoring, blocker escalation, and closure verification with evidence.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-001 (OP, cosine: 0.531), RM-S-007 (RM, cosine: 0.524).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.559). Shared vocabulary: [remediation]. DCWF-only terms [actions, assessments, audits, ensure, etc, identified] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, blocker, closure, compliance, data, escalation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.864, R=0.867). Balanced P/R — the 21-word DCWF element and 15-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Ensure plans of actions and milestones or remediation plans are in place for vul" and "Track data compliance remediation activities, including milestone monitoring, bl" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.627 > STS 0.559 (gap +0.068). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [remediation] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.1%. Shared tokens: [remediation]. DCWF-only: [actions, assessments, audits, ensure, etc, identified]. WIDAI-only: [activities, blocker, closure, compliance, data, escalation].
